calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-30-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-16-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Settlement of Claimants to the funds in interpleader.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
10:45 a.m.- Defendants: Eddie Welbon, Peter N. Hadiaris, Esq. and Robert Sheppard, Esq. present in court, parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
The Clerk is holding the sum of $75,000.00, less sums disbursed to Plaintiff Fidelity National title pursuant to the court's previous order discharging Fidelity National Title as Plaintiff, plus any interest that the funds may have accrued while is the custody of the Clerk.
The Clerk shall disburse $16,763.02 to Defendant Peter N. Hariaris, $3,500.00 to Defendant, Robert Sheppard, and remainder of the funds to Defendant, Eddie C. Welbon.
Upon receipt of his funds, Mr. Sheppard shall file a Satisfaction of Judgment in Small Claims action against Mr. Welbon.
All parties shall bear their own costs and fees and release each other from all claims.
After the funds are disbursed, parties agree to dismissed each other from the action with prejudice.
The Court approved the settlement, trial is vacted.
Mr. Hariaris to prepare Order.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Set For Trial On Jan-26-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
